implement.detail: same-document tour player (tour-player.js, framework-free, generation-token lifecycle) + C3 runtime spotlight primitive (buildRingOverlay refactor; window.__ekoaActions.spotlight/clearSpotlight, draw-only, queue-external) + panel wiring (teach launcher + assistant startTour action routes to the player; close cancels) + image containment both layers (player isSafeImagePath + demoSpecSchema pattern; 28 shipped specs stay valid)

test.detail: 35 tour-player tests (source-contract + jsdom behavioural: cancel-mid-poll, double-start single-flight, annotate-result, image traversal skip vs safe render at the exact mounted URL) + five-suite wall 79->95 green + serving/tour-writer suites; tsc src+test clean (2 lead-fixed typing gaps in the new jsdom suite); eslint 0/0; chokepoint clean

securityWall.detail: gitleaks clean all commits; zero-token proven STRUCTURALLY (no send path exists in the player module; fresh review) + counted live (POST /api/app-assistant == 0 across tour + rebuild replay); copy rendered as textContent/JSX only (no innerHTML of spec strings - no XSS even if E1 validation bypassed); image path traversal closed at schema + player; spotlight cannot dispatch actions (draw-only); no permission logic (H-block constraint honoured)

liveVerification.detail: official cast green TWICE (pre-fix 13 PASS at fde090e, post-fix 14 PASS at 16bded0 incl. fetch-count + startTour-action assertions): fresh app-base build -> teach launcher -> real playback (spotlights on real elements, await-action on a REAL user click, inject-prompt never sends, done state) -> follow-up rebuild of the SAME artifact -> same registry-ID selectors still resolve; strict console gate (allowlist verbatim-identical to D2/D3). Loop history: 2 fixture/driver defects (home-empty placeholder absent in built apps -> fc27f10 also dropped it from SHELL_LANDMARKS; bundle-update 413 -> real follow-up-build path); the player itself needed no fix in that loop

freshReview.detail: VERDICT: APPROVE (independent evidence: re-ran suites, verified zero-token structurally, C3 refactor behaviour-preserving, no XSS, boundaries intact, diagram real). 4 Lows: #1/#2 = codex 1/2 (fixed 16bded0), #3 behavioural coverage + URL verification (added; URL proven correct against the real mount), #4 selector-stability-is-a-convention -> LANDING note

codexSliceReview.detail: gpt-5.5/high read-only: NEEDS-WORK with 4 findings, ALL fixed in 16bded0 - (1 Med) abortable single-flight lifecycle via generation token; (2 Med) panel close cancels the tour; (3 Med) external-image dot-segment traversal closed at both layers, 28-spec compat verified; (4 Low) gate now asserts the demos fetch happened + exercises the assistant startTour path live

designAudit.detail: fresh review viewed the live screenshots (ring correctly surrounds real app-nav; PT-PT step UI 'Passo 2 de 6 / Seguinte / Sair'); PT-PT formal, no emoji, no em-dash, brand-neutral CSS vars verified by grep + tests

walkthrough.detail: evidence-live.cast (asciinema, 14 PASS + terminal E2 LIVE GATE: PASS) + live-output.txt + 4 screenshots under slices/E2/ (casts/PNGs gitignored per run convention; verdict files carry the record)
